side_effects.description: Major flushing with new batch of BPC-157, similar sensation to previously experienced CJC flushing

protocol_notes: Research subject with over 10 years of peptide experience. New batch triggered flushing never previously observed with BPC-157. Customer support indicated transient flushing may be related to vasodilation/nitric oxide modulation or sensitivity to peptide/bacteriostatic water. Batch claimed to be ≥99% purity via HPLC and Mass Spectrometry with CoA available.
